wedding-cakes.main > section:nth-of-type(3) > div:nth-:
The Vintage-style Lambeth cakes are really on trend at the moment. 
Choose from a single heart cake, tiered heart, circular, square or rectangle. Piped with fancy buttercream swirls and edged piping for that classic vintage feel.  We can add bows, cherries and central wording.
wedding-cakes.main > section:nth-of-type(2) > div:nth-:
Please do take a look at some of my favourite cakes in my gallery. I’ve delivered and set up cakes in some beautiful venues including Gosfield Hall, Roslin beach hotel , Maidens barn, Hylands House, Braxted Park, Apton hall, Baddow park, Crondon park, Lezz Priory, and Channels.

We are also Crondon parks recommended Wedding cake artist.
wedding-cakes.main > section:nth-of-type(4) > div:nth-: Order your Taster cupcake box, choose your flavours and pay the deposit.
